name: process_blob_event_performance_under_load
description: Measures the performance of FSRAgent.process_blob_event under concurrent requests to ensure response time is within acceptable limits.
input: Multiple concurrent valid BlobEvent requests (e.g., 20+), each with a valid PDF.
output: A list of responses, each as per the functional success case.
success_criteria: All responses are returned within a predefined SLA (e.g., < 5 seconds each)
No timeouts or resource exhaustion errors occur
No degradation in extraction or routing accuracy
